title: Up to 9
overview: Endo, who is making his rounds at night, smells tears and comes to a house where he meets a mother who is raising her child. She was depressed because she was angry with herself for her child's uncontrollable crying. What did Endo say to the mother?

title: The Bullied Child
overview: Endo, who is making his rounds at night today, smells tears and comes upon a high school boy on the roof of a building who is being bullied at school because of a teacher's comment. Endo hears their story...

title: Hero

title: You're doing your best
overview: Endo, who is making his night rounds again today, comes across a boy sleeping in a hospital bed, smelling his tears. Endo says to him that he can't do anything.

title: Celebrations
overview: A short time ago. Heizo Endo, a night cat, finds a newborn kitten whose eye was caught by a crow. Heizo is told by those around him that the cub will not survive and should be left to die, but Endo decides to raise it with his own hands.

title: I will remember
overview: Endo is on his nightly rounds again today. A woman he met, smelling her tears, had something she had done every day without fail for 23 years. What did Endo say to her?

overview: Endo is making his night rounds again today. Endo meets two junior high school girls who smell of tears, and when he hears their secret feelings for each other...

title: It's fine
overview: Endo is on his night rounds again today. He smells tears and comes to a house where he meets a woman who lives with her mother with dementia and spends her days taking care of her. Endo is a bit worried about the woman's story....

title: Someone to drink with
overview: Endo is on his nightly rounds again today. He met a 50-year-old woman who was wondering whether she should attend the reunion or not. After listening to the woman's story, what did Endo say to her...?

title: Walking
overview: Endo, who is making his night rounds again today, smells tears and meets a businessman walking at a fast pace along the street at night. The man stopped and confided in Endo, who called out to him and chased after him.... The second half of the story is about Nii's tough love.

title: No Supper Required
overview: Endo, who is making his rounds at night again today, comes across a couple at a house where he smells tears. When Endo hears the reason for their tears, he... The second half of the episode is about Nii's secret love.

title: Strangers
overview: Endo, who is on the road tonight, smells tears and comes to the wedding hall. What I met there was the tears of a family.
